parameters.content:
## Single local RAG entrypoint
POST `/webhook/rag`

Actions:
- `ingest`: multipart file field `file` (legacy `data` also accepted)
- `query`: `query`, optional `kbId`, `topK`
- `reset`: `confirm: RESET` plus `documentId` or `kbId`
- `reprocess`: `confirm: RESET` plus `documentId`

Default KB: `00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000001`
Max upload: 25 MiB.

## Folder monitoring
Every five minutes the schedule polls `/files/inbox/*`.
The same hash, deduplication, MinIO, Docling, embedding, and indexing path is used.
Both n8n main and worker containers mount the same host folder.

## Ingestion lifecycle
Validate -> SHA-256 -> register/idempotency -> MinIO -> Docling -> semantic chunks -> Ollama embeddings -> Qdrant -> PostgreSQL indexed state.

The formerly separate ingestion workflows are inlined here so this workflow exports as one portable file.

## Grounded retrieval
Normalize query -> same Ollama embedding model -> Qdrant semantic search filtered by KB -> context/source assembly -> Ollama chat -> answer + sources.

Vector retrieval is implemented now. BM25 and a separate reranker are intentionally deferred because the current local stack has neither a lexical index nor reranker service.

## Safe reset and reprocess
Reset deletes matching Qdrant points and returns PostgreSQL documents to `pending`.
MinIO source/artifacts are preserved.
`reprocess` performs the reset and then enters the ingestion pipeline using the stored source.

parameters.query:
WITH candidate AS (
  SELECT gen_random_uuid() AS id
), upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_documents (
    id, kb_id, source_sha256, filename, extension, mime_type, source_size, source_key, status
  )
  SELECT candidate.id,
         $1::uuid,
         $2::char(64),
         $3::text,
         $4::text,
         $5::text,
         $6::bigint,
         format('documents/%s/%s/source/original', $1::text, candidate.id::text),
         'pending'
  FROM candidate
  ON CONFLICT (kb_id, source_sha256) DO UPDATE
  SET filename = EXCLUDED.filename,
      extension = EXCLUDED.extension,
      mime_type = EXCLUDED.mime_type,
      source_size = EXCLUDED.source_size,
      status = CASE WHEN $7::boolean THEN 'pending' ELSE rag_documents.status END,
      error_stage = CASE WHEN $7::boolean THEN NULL ELSE rag_documents.error_stage END,
      error_code = CASE WHEN $7::boolean THEN NULL ELSE rag_documents.error_code END,
      error_message = CASE WHEN $7::boolean THEN NULL ELSE rag_documents.error_message END,
      error_details = CASE WHEN $7::boolean THEN NULL ELSE rag_documents.error_details END,
      updated_at = now()
  RETURNING *
), event AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_document_events(document_id, status, stage, details, execution_id)
  SELECT id, status, 'intake',
         jsonb_build_object('filename', filename, 'sourceSize', source_size, 'sourceSha256', source_sha256),
         $8::text
  FROM upserted
)
SELECT id::text AS "documentId",
       kb_id::text AS "kbId",
       source_key AS "sourceKey",
       source_sha256::text AS "sourceSha256",
       filename,
       extension,
       mime_type AS "mimeType",
       source_size AS "sourceSize",
       status,
       $9::text AS "requestSource"
FROM upserted;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nomic-embed-text', input: $('Return Conversion').first().json.chunks.map(c => c.text), truncate: true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [{ key: 'document_id', match: { value: $json.documentId } }] } }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH updated AS (
  UPDATE rag_documents
  SET status = 'failed',
      error_stage = $2,
      error_code = $3,
      error_message = left($4, 2000),
      error_details = $5::jsonb,
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE id = $1::uuid
  RETURNING id, kb_id, status, error_stage, error_code, error_message, updated_at
), event AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_document_events (document_id, status, stage, message, details, execution_id)
  SELECT id, 'failed', error_stage, error_message, error_details, $6
  FROM updated
)
SELECT id::text AS "documentId",
       kb_id::text AS "kbId",
       status,
       error_stage AS "errorStage",
       error_code AS "errorCode",
       error_message AS "errorMessage",
       updated_at AS "updatedAt"
FROM updated;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nomic-embed-text', input: [$('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.query], truncate: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $json.embeddings[0], filter: { must: [{ key: 'kb_id', match: { value: $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.kbId } }] }, limit: $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.topK, with_payload: true, with_vector: false, score_threshold: 0.2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, stream: false, think: false, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.system }, { role: 'user', content: 'Question:
' + $json.query + '

Context:
' + $json.context }], options: { temperature: 0.1, num_ctx: 2048 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const d=$input.first().json; return [{json:{ok:false,action:'query',error:{code:'RETRIEVAL_FAILED',message:d.error?.message||d.message||'Retrieval or generation failed'}}}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [ $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.documentId ? { key: 'document_id', match: { value: $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.documentId } } : { key: 'kb_id', match: { value: $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.kbId } } ] } }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH updated AS (
  UPDATE rag_documents
  SET status = 'pending',
      chunk_count = 0,
      indexed_at = NULL,
      error_stage = NULL,
      error_code = NULL,
      error_message = NULL,
      error_details = NULL,
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE (NULLIF($1::text, '') IS NOT NULL AND id = NULLIF($1::text, '')::uuid)
     OR (NULLIF($1::text, '') IS NULL AND kb_id = $2::uuid)
  RETURNING id, kb_id
), events AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_document_events(document_id, status, stage, message, details, execution_id)
  SELECT id, 'pending', 'admin_reset', 'Vectors removed; source artifacts preserved', '{}'::jsonb, $3::text
  FROM updated
)
SELECT count(*)::integer AS "resetCount",
       COALESCE(array_agg(id::text), ARRAY[]::text[]) AS "documentIds",
       $4::boolean AS reprocess,
       'webhook'::text AS "requestSource"
FROM updated;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.documentId, $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.kbId, $execution.id, $('Normalize and Validate Request').first().json.reprocess] }}

parameters.jsCode: const d=$input.first().json; return [{json:{ok:true,action:'query',query:d.query,answer:'The indexed documents do not contain enough information to answer this question.',sources:[],retrieval:{type:'vector',resultCount:0,collection:'rag_chunks'},model:null}}];
